title: balaniella alutacea
intro: Balaniella alutacea, also known as the "dune sandwort," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Balaniella alutacea include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling, and promote the healing process. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
